name: Progress
description: A progress bar showing determinate or indeterminate task completion. Built on Base UI Progress with StyleX styling.

Root.description: Container that provides progress state (value, min, max) to child parts.

value.description: The current value. Pass null for indeterminate.

format.description: Formatting options for the displayed value.

Label.description: An accessible label for the progress bar.

Track.description: The background track of the progress bar.

size.description: Height of the track (sm=4px, md=8px, lg=12px).

Indicator.description: The filled portion of the progress bar, proportional to the value.

Value.description: Displays the formatted value of the progress.

cssRequirements.description: Indeterminate progress animation for the indicator.

intents.reasoning: Progress shows how far along a task is toward completion. Use for file uploads, form submissions, or any ongoing operation.
Progress with null value shows an indeterminate animation for operations with unknown duration.

avoidWhen.scenario: Showing a scalar measurement within a range
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Meter for static values like disk usage or battery level. Progress is for ongoing operations.
Use a spinner component for compact loading states. Progress is a horizontal bar.
Use a stepper component for step-by-step progress. Progress shows continuous completion.

examples.name: colors
examples.code:
<>
  <Progress.Root value={30}>
    <Progress.Track>
      <Progress.Indicator color="default" />
    </Progress.Track>
  </Progress.Root>
  <Progress.Root value={60}>
    <Progress.Track>
      <Progress.Indicator color="secondary" />
    </Progress.Track>
  </Progress.Root>
  <Progress.Root value={90}>
    <Progress.Track>
      <Progress.Indicator color="destructive" />
    </Progress.Track>
  </Progress.Root>
</>
